name: Time to Rage
description: Pauses game if you die after a set percentage

percentage-default-value.name: Default value for rage
percentage-default-value.description: Sets the default value for rage percentage

overrides-settings.name: Override reasons for mod not to run

startpos-override.name: Run on StartPos
startpos-override.description: Usually, the mod doesn't run if you're playing from a StartPos, this setting just makes it so it does

practice-mode-override.name: Run on Practice Mode
practice-mode-override.description: Usually, the mod doesn't run if you're playing in Practice Mode, this setting just makes it so it does
